title: EARLY DISCUSSION AND RESOLUTION - 211info
text: OREGON PATIENT SAFETY COMMISSION EARLY DISCUSSION AND RESOLUTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a method to make complaints about mistreatment at health care facilities outside of the legal system using the Early Discussion and Resolution (EDR) process. A resolution may include an apology, answers to questions, improvements to care, or compensation. Qualifying events must have taken place in the state of Oregon on or after July 1, 2014. Eligibility: Individuals (or their representative) who experienced care at a healthcare facility or involving a healthcare provider that resulted in serious physical injury or death Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 928-6158 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 928-6158 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete the request for conversation online intake form and create an online EDR account. EDR account gives participants access to the secure, confidential EDR portal to view request details and keep EDR updated on participants progress. Email or call for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Adult Residential Facility Complaints Health Facility Complaints Practitioner Complaints If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
